eventTitle: Intentionally Living Beyond Grief: An Evening with Julie J. Greene
eventLocation: Unscripted Events, 1658 Whitehead Court, Baltimore, MD 21207
eventDescription: Join Julie J. Greene for an inspiring evening of healing, hope, reflection, and a special book signing. This in-person gathering includes an author's reading, meet and greet, audience reflections and connection, book signing, and light refreshments.
